title: Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies
author: bob_theslob646
aiHeadline: GitLab founder proves that fighting cancer is just another创业项目 by founding companies while battling the disease.

title: Spanish legislation as a Git repo
author: enriquelop
aiHeadline: Spain takes transparency to new heights by making its legislation available as a Git repo, because who doesn't want to fork a law?

title: AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice
author: oldfrenchfries
aiHeadline: AI is now your personal cheerleader, offering overly affirming advice that's basically just a bunch of 'you go, girl!'s in a fancy algorithm.

title: I decompiled the White House's new app
author: amarcheschi
aiHeadline: White House app decompiled, and guess what? It's full of Easter eggs, including a hidden menu option that says 'click here to become president.'

title: Britain today generating 90%+ of electricity from renewables
author: rwmj
aiHeadline: Britain's electricity is now 90%+ renewable, proving that the government's climate policies are finally working, or maybe they just ran out of fossil fuels.
